capex_mentions.quote: Initial consideration related to the 2024 acquisitions was $294.8 million, with additional consideration up to $111.6 million
capex_mentions.context: 2024 acquisitions including OrthoGrid (AI-driven surgical guidance); not exclusively AI-attributable but OrthoGrid is AI-focused

limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No standalone AI-specific R&D or capex dollar amounts disclosed; OrthoGrid acquisition is the clearest AI-attributable investment but total acquisition consideration covers multiple non-AI deals; R&D headcount figure is not AI-specific

ai_narrative_concreteness: Named AI use cases (surgical guidance, cybersecurity tooling, digital/robotic platform) are described with operational context but no quantified business results (e.g., procedure volumes, accuracy rates, cost savings) are provided, capping score at 4

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Risk-factor excerpts are present and contain substantive AI risk discussion; mechanisms (patient harm, regulatory inconsistency, enhanced cyber attacker capability) are named but no quantification or formal governance body for AI risk is disclosed, capping score at 4
